revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月11日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと ==
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]16年（グレゴリオ暦[[1811年]][[11月26日]]） - [[曽国藩]]、[[清]]の[[政治家]]（+ [[1872年]]）<!-- 旧暦11月26日より移動--> * [[慶応]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1867年]][[11月6日]]） - [[鈴木喜三郎]]、政治家（+ [[1940年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛喜]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1231年]][[11月6日]]） - [[土御門天皇]]、83代[[天皇]]（* [[1195年]]） * [[慶安]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1649年]][[11月15日]]） - [[近衛信尋]]、[[公卿]]・[[関白]]（* [[1599年]]） * [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841年]][[11月23日]]） - [[渡辺崋山]]、[[蘭学者]]・画家（* [[1793年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Moving from [[Category:友引]] to [[Category:Tomobiki]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
removing all the commented out stuff
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
Removing from [[Category:New pages most likely u]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding korean to all the dates
removed [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]]; added [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template

[[sn:October 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}}, a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}}, a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}}, the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}}, a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|公卿}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}}, a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|蘭学者}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[sn:October 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}}, a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}}, a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}}, the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}}, a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|公卿}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}}, a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|蘭学者}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[October 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[October 11 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|公卿}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|蘭学者}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[sn:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|公卿}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|蘭学者}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[sn:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|蘭学者}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )

[[sn:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar}} and painter ( * [[1793]] ) == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[sn:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar}} and painter ( * [[1793]] ) == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[sn:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )

[[sn:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[sn:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶|12=draft}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩|12=draft}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清|12=draft}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎|12=draft}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|12=draft}} ( + [[1940]] )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇|12=draft}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋|12=draft}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白|12=draft}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar|12=draft}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]]
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶|12=draft}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[1811]] {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Sokoku Han|ja|曽国藩|12=draft}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Qing|ja|清|12=draft}} ( + [[1872]] ) * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1867]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kisaburō Suzuki|ja|鈴木喜三郎|12=draft}} , a {{ill|politician|ja|政治家|12=draft}} ( + [[1940]] )

== See Also ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanki|ja|寛喜|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1231]] {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tsuchimikado Emperor|ja|土御門天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} ( * [[1195]] ) * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1649]] {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋|12=draft|12=draft}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白|12=draft|12=draft}} ( * [[1599]] ) * {{ill|Tempō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} [[1841]] {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar|12=draft|12=draft}} and painter ( * [[1793]] )

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q836346]] Wikidata name: October 11 [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 11|qq=October 11}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Jiaqing (China)|ja|嘉慶 (中国)|lt=Jiaqing|lt_ja=嘉慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiaqing (China)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 嘉慶 (清)|1=Jiaqing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077543}} 16th year (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1811|1811]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ) – [[:en:Zeng Guofan|Sokoku Han]] , a [[:en:Politician|politician]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]] ( + [[:en:1872|1872]] ) * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Suzuki Kisaburō|Kisaburō Suzuki]] , a [[:en:Politician|politician]] ( + [[:en:1940|1940]] )
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kangi|Kanki]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1231|1231]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado Emperor]] , the 83rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] ( * [[:en:1195|1195]] ) * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1649|1649]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ) – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sesshō|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}} ( * [[:en:1599|1599]] ) * [[:en:Tenpō|Tempō]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasan]] , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar|1=Rangaku scholar|2=ja|3=蘭学者|WD=Q11625245|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dutch scholar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11625245}} and painter ( * [[:en:1793|1793]] )

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kangi|en|Kangi|WD=Q1194200|lt=Kanki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1231|en|1231|WD=Q5417|lt=1231}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Tsuchimikado|en|Emperor Tsuchimikado|WD=Q357269|lt=Tsuchimikado Emperor}} , the 83rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} ( * {{ill|1195|en|1195|WD=Q19745|lt=1195}} ) * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1649|en|1649|WD=Q6945|lt=1649}} {{ill|November 15|en|November 15|WD=Q2982|lt=November 15}} ) – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|en|Konoe Nobuhiro|WD=Q923621|lt=Konoe Nobuhiro}} , a member of the {{ill|kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} and {{ill|Sesshō|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sesshō|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199966}} ( * {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}} ) * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tempō}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841}} {{ill|November 23|en|November 23|WD=Q3021|lt=November 23}} ) – {{ill|Watanabe Kazan|en|Watanabe Kazan|WD=Q3130609|lt=Watanabe Kasan}} , a {{ill|Dutch scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar|1=Rangaku scholar|2=ja|3=蘭学者|WD=Q11625245|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dutch scholar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11625245}} and painter ( * {{ill|1793|en|1793|WD=Q7807|lt=1793}} )
